description: Refactor workflow to support custom stage injection while maintaining backward compatibility
prompt: We need to allow users to inject custom stages into the workflow (e.g., add a 'deploy' stage after iteration). Refactor the workflow system to support this while maintaining backward compatibility for existing code. Provide a migration guide for teams already using π.

key_changes: Extract stage logic into pluggable Stage classes
Update workflow runner to use dynamic stages
success_criteria: Existing workflows work without changes (backward compat)
Custom stages can be registered and executed
Integration tests cover both old and new APIs
testing_strategy: Backward compatibility tests with old workflow calls
Custom stage registration and execution tests
Integration tests for multi-stage custom workflows
migration_considerations: No breaking changes to existing CLI usage

notes: Tests ability to handle team-scale concerns: API design, migration, backward compatibility
